name: Helium
description: Trying it out for a bit, seems nice. But will switch back to Firefox if it doesn't work out.

name: Windsurf
description: I will sometimes reach for Neovim or Helix for quick fixes.

name: Ghostty
description: Warp and Wezterm are both good, but Ghostty just works so well.

name: Obsidian
description: Use it for all my notes.

name: Proton Mail, Pass, and Drive
description: Went with Proton when I degoogled and have been happy with it for a few years now.

name: OVPN
description: Using it as a work VPN, but also for personal use.

name: NetNewsWire
description: Using it while I finish building my own RSS/Feed manager.

name: Raycast
description: I can't imagine using a Mac without it.
